channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 34 Maberley Road, pavement around manhole cover sunk, posing trip hazzard, 13th April
item.description:
Outside 34 Maberley Road, the pavement around the manhole cover has sunk, posing a trip hazard to passing pedestrians. I think it should be filled, please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Maberley Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Broken bollard, exposed rebar, padestrian saftey hazard, 13th April
item.description:
A bollard has been struck here on the junction of Windall Close with Maberley Road. Resulting in the bollard being missing in place, and a piece of rebar being exposed, which poses a risk to pedestrians. The bollard to be put back in place, or replaced, and until done so, the site should be made safe with rebar removed, and resesed part (trip hazard) filled. If this is not the council's responsibility, the council should contact the person(s) responsible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22-24, Maberley Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shinglewell Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on TWO street lamps around the junction of Anerley Hill with Cintra Park, 13th April
item.description:
On two lamp posts; one gray lampost and one green lamp post... Bronze coloured spray paint tag can be found on the painted metal surface two lamposts arround the junction of Anerley Hill with Cintra Park. Please see to photos attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
